title: stella radiata
intro: Stella radiata, also known as Starflower, is a plant species belonging to the genus Calendula, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The medicinal properties of Stella radiata lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Stella radiata include wound healing, reducing inflammation, and promoting skin health, making it a popular ingredient in skincare products and herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Stella radiata can be found in the form of teas, salves, and ointments, which are often used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
